page_content:
Recommended: HHUM105.

Restriction: Must be in the Honors Humanities Program.

Additional Information: Priority enrollment will be given to students in Honors Humanities.

HHUM205 Second Year Seminar in Honors Humanities (3 Credits) Seminar on basic issues and methodologies in the humanities and arts. Credit Only Granted for: ARHU205 or HHUM205.
